notes: Hub-style menu redesign: profile sidebar on the left (avatar, level, XP, Pulse, Surge), bottom navigation tabs (HOME · PLAY · SETTINGS · ACCOUNT), animated character showcase on HOME with shooting + dashing demo, ambient music loop on the menu, inline pages instead of modals.
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows (defensive file checks, absolute cmd.exe path, retry-loop until file unlocked). Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
